channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Crystal Pool Closed After Chlorine Gas Incident, Reopening Planned for Tuesday
item.description: A chemical incident at Crystal Pool and Fitness Centre in Victoria on Friday led to the evacuation of nearly 90 patrons and 13 staff members after two chemicals combined to produce chlorine gas. Eight...

item.title: Efforts Underway to Boost Cassava Production in Nigeria Amid Decline
item.description: Cassava farmers for Nigeria don dey talk say the country dey lose millions of naira yearly because cassava production don dey fall everywhere. Dem yan say na lack of pest control, poor managerial skil...

item.title: Former Big Un CEO pleads guilty after ASIC insider trading investigation
item.description: Richard Evans, the former chief executive of the now-defunct online video company Big Un, has pleaded guilty to insider trading after a lengthy investigation by the Australian Securities and Investmen...

item.title: US and Iran resume expert-level negotiations in Islamabad amid temporary ceasefire
item.description: In a significant diplomatic development, expert teams from Iran and the United States exchanged written documents following lengthy in-person talks in Islamabad, marking the first direct dialogue betw...

item.title: US and Iran plan peace talks amid tensions over Lebanon and sanctions
item.description: The United States and Iran are scheduled to hold peace talks in Islamabad to try and end their ongoing six-week conflict, though Iran has introduced conditions that could delay the negotiations. Iran ...

item.title: Multiple Fatalities and Injuries Reported in Bihar Highway Collision
item.description: According to reports from local authorities, a tragic multi-vehicle accident occurred on a major highway in Bihar, resulting in the death of ten individuals and injuring around twenty-five others. The...

item.title: Leyte community journalist and church worker appeal terror financing conviction to Court of Appeals
item.description: Community journalist Frenchie May Cumpio and church worker Mariel Domequil are seeking relief from the Philippine Court of Appeals after a trial court in Tacloban, Leyte denied their motion to overtur...

item.title: University of Ottawa lockdown suspect arrested with replica firearm, no injuries reported
item.description: On Friday evening, the University of Ottawa was placed on lockdown after reports of a suspicious person near Nicholas Street and Laurier Avenue. The university issued an emergency alert at approximate...

item.title: Trump Plans Widespread Pardons for Associates Before Leaving Office
item.description: Reports indicate that former President Donald Trump has stated he intends to issue mass pardons to his closest advisers at the conclusion of his second term. Over the past year, Trump has reportedly m...

item.title: Joanna Cassidy, Blade Runner star, shines at 80 during casual Los Angeles outing
item.description: Joanna Cassidy, the American actress best known for her role as replicant Zhora Salome in the 1982 sci-fi classic Blade Runner alongside Harrison Ford, made a rare public appearance in Los Angeles loo...

item.title: US revokes permanent residency of three Iranian nationals over links to Tehran's leadership
item.description: The US State Department has announced the revocation of green cards belonging to three Iranian nationals alleged to have close family ties to Iran’s regime and military leadership. The individuals inc...

item.title: Weekly Business Update: Trade, Infrastructure, Cryptocurrency Fraud and Energy Market Shifts
item.description: This week’s business and investing news highlights several developments with implications for Canada and the global economy. The United States expects the USMCA trade agreement to remain largely intac...

item.title: Cheetah KGP-2 Gives Birth to Four Cubs at Kuno National Park
item.description: A major *taarif* is in order! Kuno National Park has welcomed a wonderful addition to its cheetah population – KGP-2, an Indian-born female cheetah, has successfully given birth to four cubs. This is ...

item.title: Trump Administration Proposes Triumphal Arch Taller Than Lincoln Memorial
item.description: The Interior Department has submitted plans for a new triumphal arch proposed by former President Donald Trump, intended to stand near Arlington National Cemetery. The design, dubbed the 'Arc de Trump...

item.title: US Navy Conducts Mine Clearance in Strait of Hormuz Amid Tensions
item.description: On April 11, 2026, the US Central Command (Centcom) confirmed that two American warships, USS Frank E Peterson and USS Michael Murphy, transited the Strait of Hormuz as part of a mine clearance operat...

item.title: Mngqithi praises Arrows resilience despite narrow 1-0 win over Durban City
item.description: Lamontville Golden Arrows head coach Manqoba Mngqithi expressed mixed feelings after his team's 1-0 victory against Durban City at King Zwelithini Stadium in Umlazi. Despite dominating possession and ...

item.title: Pakistan Deploys Military Support to Saudi Arabia Amid Regional Tensions
item.description: Pakistan has sent a military contingent along with fighter jets to Saudi Arabia as part of the ongoing strategic cooperation between the two countries. The deployment, confirmed by the Saudi defence m...

item.title: Government Committed to Expanding Digital Financial Inclusion in Tanzania
item.description: The Tanzanian government is making a serious commitment to strengthening the financial sector, spurred by the impressive statistic that 76 percent of Tanzanians are now accessing formal financial serv...

item.title: Choosing Durable and Effective Baking Sheets for Home and Professional Use
item.description: Professional bakers emphasize that the quality of a bake is influenced not just by ingredients and technique, but also by the baking pan used. According to experts like Veronica Amaya of Calgary’s Can...

item.title: Over 200 People Arrested in London for Supporting Proscribed Group Palestine Action
item.description: More than 200 individuals have been arrested during a demonstration in central London supporting Palestine Action, according to the Metropolitan Police. The protest, which took place in Trafalgar Squa...
